reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify NYC high schools in the top 3 by overall score in 2011-12 and 2012-13, then keep the school that appears in both lists.
2. Using the high school performance directory, keep the school from step 1 that had an A grade in the 2010-11 progress report.
3. Using the school locations dataset, determine the ZIP code of that school.
4. Using the neighborhood reference page whose primary ZIP code matches step 3, determine the percentage of White residents in the 2010 census.
original_final_question: I want to study the demographic in NYC. Can you find me the zip code of the NYC high school that was in the top 3 by overall progress score in the school year 2011-13 and had an A grade in the 2010-11 progress. Report the percentage of White people contributing to the racial makeup of the neighborhood whose primary ZIP code is the same as that high school based on data in 2010 census?. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

original_reasoning_chain.answer: It Takes a Village Academy and Academy for Careers in Television and Film
